title: extract_response uses tuple index access on Invocation
description: client.rs extract_response() accesses inv.0, inv.1, inv.2 on Invocation = (String, serde_json::Value, String). The tuple positions are not self-evident; a reader must look up the type alias to know inv.0 is the method name and inv.1 is the arguments. Destructuring at the find() call site — let (method, args, _) = inv; — would make intent readable inline without requiring a cross-file lookup. This is especially relevant for the inv.0 == 'error' check which is the critical path.
